tagline: Premium look. Real work. Built for serious vehicles.
description: Angels Electronics gives Los Angeles drivers a high-end finish with window tint, car audio, wraps, alarms, lights, backup cameras, paint protection film, and custom electronics done clean.

services.title: Window Tint
services.description: Professional window tint installation for privacy, heat reduction, and a clean finished look.

services.title: Car Audio
services.description: Speakers, radios, amps, subwoofers, and full sound system upgrades.

services.title: Alarm Systems
services.description: Vehicle security systems installed clean and professionally.

services.title: Car Wrap
services.description: Full wraps, partial wraps, color changes, and custom styling.

services.title: Paint Protection Film (PPF)
services.description: Protect your paint from scratches, chips, and daily wear.

services.title: Lights & Cameras
services.description: Backup cameras, LED lighting, and custom electronics installs.

reviews.name: David Martinez
reviews.text: Recomiendo este lugar si tienes alguna falla eléctrica también pueden ayudarte. Trabajo limpio y organizado.

reviews.name: Jonathan Benitez
reviews.text: Good service, polite, professional, and reasonable pricing. Highly recommend.

reviews.name: Kaylen
reviews.text: Installed my headlights and bumper fast. Super helpful definitely recommend.

reviews.name: Khristian Rodriguez
reviews.text: Been going for years. Good customer service, excellent prices, quality work.
